tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersAssetsUpload
tools.description: Uploads an asset. Returns the ID of the newly uploaded asset if successful. The asset file size should be no more than 10 MB for images, 200 MB for ZIP files, and 1 GB for videos. Must be used within the [multipart media upload process](/display-video/api/guides/how-tos/upload#multipart). Examples using provided client libraries can be found in our [Creating Creatives guide](/display-video/api/guides/creating-creatives/overview#upload_an_asset).

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersAudit
tools.description: Audits an advertiser. Returns the counts of used entities per resource type under the advertiser provided. Used entities count towards their respective resource limit. See https://support.google.com/displayvideo/answer/6071450.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersBulkEditAdvertiserAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Bulk edits targeting options under a single advertiser. The operation will delete the assigned targeting options provided in BulkEditAdvertiserAssignedTargetingOptionsRequest.delete_requests and then create the assigned targeting options provided in BulkEditAdvertiserAssignedTargetingOptionsRequest.create_requests .

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersBulkListAdvertiserAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Lists assigned targeting options of an advertiser across targeting types.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsBulkListCampaignAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Lists assigned targeting options of a campaign across targeting types.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new campaign. Returns the newly created campaign if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsDelete
tools.description: Permanently deletes a campaign. A deleted campaign cannot be recovered. The campaign should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, to be able to delete it.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsGet
tools.description: Gets a campaign.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsList
tools.description: Lists campaigns in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, campaigns with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing campaign. Returns the updated campaign if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsGet
tools.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to a campaign.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCampaignsTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsList
tools.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to a campaign for a specified targeting type.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new channel. Returns the newly created channel if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsList
tools.description: Lists channels for a partner or advertiser.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsPatch
tools.description: Updates a channel. Returns the updated channel if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsSitesBulkEdit
tools.description: Bulk edits sites under a single channel. The operation will delete the sites provided in BulkEditSitesRequest.deleted_sites and then create the sites provided in BulkEditSitesRequest.created_sites.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsSitesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a site from a channel.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsSitesList
tools.description: Lists sites in a channel.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersChannelsSitesReplace
tools.description: Replaces all of the sites under a single channel. The operation will replace the sites under a channel with the sites provided in ReplaceSitesRequest.new_sites.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCreate
tools.description: Creates a new advertiser. Returns the newly created advertiser if successful. This method can take up to 180 seconds to complete.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCreativesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new creative. Returns the newly created creative if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCreativesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a creative. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the creative does not exist. The creative should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, before it can be deleted.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCreativesGet
tools.description: Gets a creative.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCreativesList
tools.description: Lists creatives in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, creatives with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersCreativesPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing creative. Returns the updated creative if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersDelete
tools.description: Deletes an advertiser. Deleting an advertiser will delete all of its child resources, for example, campaigns, insertion orders and line items. A deleted advertiser cannot be recovered.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersGet
tools.description: Gets an advertiser.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersBulkListInsertionOrderAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Lists assigned targeting options of an insertion order across targeting types.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersCreate
tools.description: Creates a new insertion order. Returns the newly created insertion order if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersDelete
tools.description: Deletes an insertion order. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the insertion order does not exist. The insertion order should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, to be able to delete it.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersGet
tools.description: Gets an insertion order. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the insertion order does not exist.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersList
tools.description: Lists insertion orders in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, insertion orders with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing insertion order. Returns the updated insertion order if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsGet
tools.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to an insertion order.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInsertionOrdersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsList
tools.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to an insertion order.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInvoicesList
tools.description: Lists invoices posted for an advertiser in a given month. Invoices generated by billing profiles with a "Partner" invoice level are not retrievable through this method.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersInvoicesLookupInvoiceCurrency
tools.description: Retrieves the invoice currency used by an advertiser in a given month.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsBulkEditLineItemAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Bulk edits targeting options under a single line item. The operation will delete the assigned targeting options provided in BulkEditLineItemAssignedTargetingOptionsRequest.delete_requests and then create the assigned targeting options provided in BulkEditLineItemAssignedTargetingOptionsRequest.create_requests. Requests to this endpoint cannot be made concurrently with the following requests updating the same line item: * UpdateLineItem * CreateLineItemAssignedTargetingOption * DeleteLineItemAssignedTargetingOption

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsBulkListLineItemAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Lists assigned targeting options of a line item across targeting types.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new line item. Returns the newly created line item if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a line item. Returns error code `NOT_FOUND` if the line item does not exist. The line item should be archived first, i.e. set entity_status to `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED`, to be able to delete it.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsGenerateDefault
tools.description: Creates a new line item with settings (including targeting) inherited from the insertion order and an `ENTITY_STATUS_DRAFT` entity_status. Returns the newly created line item if successful. There are default values based on the three fields: * The insertion order's insertion_order_type * The insertion order's automation_type * The given line_item_type

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsGet
tools.description: Gets a line item.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsList
tools.description: Lists line items in an advertiser. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, line items with `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing line item. Returns the updated line item if successful. Requests to this endpoint cannot be made concurrently with the following requests updating the same line item: * BulkEditAssignedTargetingOptions * BulkUpdateLineItems * CreateLineItemAssignedTargetingOption * DeleteLineItemAssignedTargetingOption

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsCreate
tools.description: Assigns a targeting option to a line item. Returns the assigned targeting option if successful. Requests to this endpoint cannot be made concurrently with the following requests updating the same line item: * BulkEditAssignedTargetingOptions * BulkUpdate * UpdateLineItem * DeleteLineItemAssignedTargetingOption

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an assigned targeting option from a line item. Requests to this endpoint cannot be made concurrently with the following requests updating the same line item: * BulkEditAssignedTargetingOptions * BulkUpdate * UpdateLineItem * CreateLineItemAssignedTargetingOption

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsGet
tools.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to a line item.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLineItemsTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsList
tools.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to a line item.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersList
tools.description: Lists advertisers that are accessible to the current user. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. A single partner_id is required. Cross-partner listing is not supported.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsAssignedLocationsBulkEdit
tools.description: Bulk edits multiple assignments between locations and a single location list. The operation will delete the assigned locations provided in BulkEditAssignedLocationsRequest.deleted_assigned_locations and then create the assigned locations provided in BulkEditAssignedLocationsRequest.created_assigned_locations.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsAssignedLocationsCreate
tools.description: Creates an assignment between a location and a location list.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsAssignedLocationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the assignment between a location and a location list.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsAssignedLocationsList
tools.description: Lists locations assigned to a location list.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new location list. Returns the newly created location list if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsList
tools.description: Lists location lists based on a given advertiser id.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersLocationListsPatch
tools.description: Updates a location list. Returns the updated location list if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersManualTriggersActivate
tools.description: Activates a manual trigger. Each activation of the manual trigger must be at least 5 minutes apart, otherwise an error will be returned.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersManualTriggersCreate
tools.description: Creates a new manual trigger. Returns the newly created manual trigger if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersManualTriggersDeactivate
tools.description: Deactivates a manual trigger.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersManualTriggersGet
tools.description: Gets a manual trigger.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersManualTriggersList
tools.description: Lists manual triggers that are accessible to the current user for a given advertiser ID. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. A single advertiser_id is required.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersManualTriggersPatch
tools.description: Updates a manual trigger. Returns the updated manual trigger if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new negative keyword list. Returns the newly created negative keyword list if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsList
tools.description: Lists negative keyword lists based on a given advertiser id.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsNegativeKeywordsBulkEdit
tools.description: Bulk edits negative keywords in a single negative keyword list. The operation will delete the negative keywords provided in BulkEditNegativeKeywordsRequest.deleted_negative_keywords and then create the negative keywords provided in BulkEditNegativeKeywordsRequest.created_negative_keywords. This operation is guaranteed to be atomic and will never result in a partial success or partial failure.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsNegativeKeywordsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a negative keyword from a negative keyword list.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsNegativeKeywordsList
tools.description: Lists negative keywords in a negative keyword list.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsNegativeKeywordsReplace
tools.description: Replaces all negative keywords in a single negative keyword list. The operation will replace the keywords in a negative keyword list with keywords provided in ReplaceNegativeKeywordsRequest.new_negative_keywords.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersNegativeKeywordListsPatch
tools.description: Updates a negative keyword list. Returns the updated negative keyword list if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing advertiser. Returns the updated advertiser if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsCreate
tools.description: Assigns a targeting option to an advertiser. Returns the assigned targeting option if successful.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an assigned targeting option from an advertiser.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsGet
tools.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to an advertiser.

tools.name: advertisers.displayvideoAdvertisersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsList
tools.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to an advertiser.

tools.name: combinedAudiences.displayvideoCombinedAudiencesList
tools.description: Lists combined audiences. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new custom bidding algorithm. Returns the newly created custom bidding algorithm if successful.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsGet
tools.description: Gets a custom bidding algorithm.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsList
tools.description: Lists custom bidding algorithms that are accessible to the current user and can be used in bidding stratgies. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing custom bidding algorithm. Returns the updated custom bidding algorithm if successful.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsScriptsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new custom bidding script. Returns the newly created script if successful.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsScriptsGet
tools.description: Gets a custom bidding script.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsScriptsList
tools.description: Lists custom bidding scripts that belong to the given algorithm. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: customBiddingAlgorithms.displayvideoCustomBiddingAlgorithmsUploadScript
tools.description: Creates a custom bidding script reference object for a script file. The resulting reference object provides a resource path to which the script file should be uploaded. This reference object should be included in when creating a new custom bidding script object.

tools.name: customLists.displayvideoCustomListsGet
tools.description: Gets a custom list.

tools.name: customLists.displayvideoCustomListsList
tools.description: Lists custom lists. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: firstAndThirdPartyAudiences.displayvideoFirstAndThirdPartyAudiencesCreate
tools.description: Creates a FirstAndThirdPartyAudience. Only supported for the following audience_type: * `CUSTOMER_MATCH_CONTACT_INFO` * `CUSTOMER_MATCH_DEVICE_ID`

tools.name: firstAndThirdPartyAudiences.displayvideoFirstAndThirdPartyAudiencesEditCustomerMatchMembers
tools.description: Updates the member list of a Customer Match audience. Only supported for the following audience_type: * `CUSTOMER_MATCH_CONTACT_INFO` * `CUSTOMER_MATCH_DEVICE_ID`

tools.name: firstAndThirdPartyAudiences.displayvideoFirstAndThirdPartyAudiencesGet
tools.description: Gets a first and third party audience.

tools.name: firstAndThirdPartyAudiences.displayvideoFirstAndThirdPartyAudiencesList
tools.description: Lists first and third party audiences. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: firstAndThirdPartyAudiences.displayvideoFirstAndThirdPartyAudiencesPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing FirstAndThirdPartyAudience. Only supported for the following audience_type: * `CUSTOMER_MATCH_CONTACT_INFO` * `CUSTOMER_MATCH_DEVICE_ID`

tools.name: floodlightGroups.displayvideoFloodlightGroupsGet
tools.description: Gets a Floodlight group.

tools.name: googleAudiences.displayvideoGoogleAudiencesGet
tools.description: Gets a Google audience.

tools.name: googleAudiences.displayvideoGoogleAudiencesList
tools.description: Lists Google audiences. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: guaranteedOrders.displayvideoGuaranteedOrdersCreate
tools.description: Creates a new guaranteed order. Returns the newly created guaranteed order if successful.

tools.name: guaranteedOrders.displayvideoGuaranteedOrdersEditGuaranteedOrderReadAccessors
tools.description: Edits read advertisers of a guaranteed order.

tools.name: guaranteedOrders.displayvideoGuaranteedOrdersGet
tools.description: Gets a guaranteed order.

tools.name: guaranteedOrders.displayvideoGuaranteedOrdersList
tools.description: Lists guaranteed orders that are accessible to the current user. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, guaranteed orders with entity status `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.

tools.name: guaranteedOrders.displayvideoGuaranteedOrdersPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing guaranteed order. Returns the updated guaranteed order if successful.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsAssignedInventorySourcesBulkEdit
tools.description: Bulk edits multiple assignments between inventory sources and a single inventory source group. The operation will delete the assigned inventory sources provided in BulkEditAssignedInventorySourcesRequest.deleted_assigned_inventory_sources and then create the assigned inventory sources provided in BulkEditAssignedInventorySourcesRequest.created_assigned_inventory_sources.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsAssignedInventorySourcesCreate
tools.description: Creates an assignment between an inventory source and an inventory source group.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsAssignedInventorySourcesDelete
tools.description: Deletes the assignment between an inventory source and an inventory source group.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsAssignedInventorySourcesList
tools.description: Lists inventory sources assigned to an inventory source group.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new inventory source group. Returns the newly created inventory source group if successful.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an inventory source group.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsGet
tools.description: Gets an inventory source group.

tools.name: inventorySourceGroups.displayvideoInventorySourceGroupsList
tools.description: Lists inventory source groups that are accessible to the current user. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: inventorySources.displayvideoInventorySourcesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new inventory source. Returns the newly created inventory source if successful.

tools.name: inventorySources.displayvideoInventorySourcesEditInventorySourceReadWriteAccessors
tools.description: Edits read/write accessors of an inventory source. Returns the updated read_write_accessors for the inventory source.

tools.name: inventorySources.displayvideoInventorySourcesGet
tools.description: Gets an inventory source.

tools.name: inventorySources.displayvideoInventorySourcesList
tools.description: Lists inventory sources that are accessible to the current user. The order is defined by the order_by parameter. If a filter by entity_status is not specified, inventory sources with entity status `ENTITY_STATUS_ARCHIVED` will not be included in the results.

tools.name: inventorySources.displayvideoInventorySourcesPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing inventory source. Returns the updated inventory source if successful.

tools.name: media.displayvideoMediaDownload
tools.description: Downloads media. Download is supported on the URI `/download/{resource_name=**}?alt=media.` **Note**: Download requests will not be successful without including `alt=media` query string.

tools.name: media.displayvideoMediaUpload
tools.description: Uploads media. Upload is supported on the URI `/upload/media/{resource_name=**}?upload_type=media.` **Note**: Upload requests will not be successful without including `upload_type=media` query string.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersBulkEditPartnerAssignedTargetingOptions
tools.description: Bulk edits targeting options under a single partner. The operation will delete the assigned targeting options provided in BulkEditPartnerAssignedTargetingOptionsRequest.deleteRequests and then create the assigned targeting options provided in BulkEditPartnerAssignedTargetingOptionsRequest.createRequests .

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new channel. Returns the newly created channel if successful.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsList
tools.description: Lists channels for a partner or advertiser.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsPatch
tools.description: Updates a channel. Returns the updated channel if successful.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsSitesBulkEdit
tools.description: Bulk edits sites under a single channel. The operation will delete the sites provided in BulkEditSitesRequest.deleted_sites and then create the sites provided in BulkEditSitesRequest.created_sites.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsSitesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a site from a channel.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsSitesList
tools.description: Lists sites in a channel.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersChannelsSitesReplace
tools.description: Replaces all of the sites under a single channel. The operation will replace the sites under a channel with the sites provided in ReplaceSitesRequest.new_sites.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersGet

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersList
tools.description: Lists partners that are accessible to the current user. The order is defined by the order_by parameter.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsCreate
tools.description: Assigns a targeting option to a partner. Returns the assigned targeting option if successful.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an assigned targeting option from a partner.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsGet
tools.description: Gets a single targeting option assigned to a partner.

tools.name: partners.displayvideoPartnersTargetingTypesAssignedTargetingOptionsList
tools.description: Lists the targeting options assigned to a partner.

tools.name: sdfdownloadtasks.displayvideoSdfdownloadtasksCreate
tools.description: Creates an SDF Download Task. Returns an Operation. An SDF Download Task is a long-running, asynchronous operation. The metadata type of this operation is SdfDownloadTaskMetadata. If the request is successful, the response type of the operation is SdfDownloadTask. The response will not include the download files, which must be retrieved with media.download. The state of operation can be retrieved with sdfdownloadtask.operations.get. Any errors can be found in the error.message. Note that error.details is expected to be empty.

tools.name: sdfdownloadtasks.displayvideoSdfdownloadtasksOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of an asynchronous SDF download task operation. Clients should poll this method at intervals of 30 seconds.

tools.name: targetingTypes.displayvideoTargetingTypesTargetingOptionsGet
tools.description: Gets a single targeting option.

tools.name: targetingTypes.displayvideoTargetingTypesTargetingOptionsList
tools.description: Lists targeting options of a given type.

tools.name: targetingTypes.displayvideoTargetingTypesTargetingOptionsSearch
tools.description: Searches for targeting options of a given type based on the given search terms.

tools.name: users.displayvideoUsersBulkEditAssignedUserRoles
tools.description: Bulk edits user roles for a user. The operation will delete the assigned user roles provided in BulkEditAssignedUserRolesRequest.deletedAssignedUserRoles and then assign the user roles provided in BulkEditAssignedUserRolesRequest.createdAssignedUserRoles.

tools.name: users.displayvideoUsersCreate
tools.description: Creates a new user. Returns the newly created user if successful.

tools.name: users.displayvideoUsersDelete
tools.description: Deletes a user.

tools.name: users.displayvideoUsersGet
tools.description: Gets a user.

tools.name: users.displayvideoUsersList
tools.description: Lists users that are accessible to the current user. If two users have user roles on the same partner or advertiser, they can access each other.

tools.name: users.displayvideoUsersPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing user. Returns the updated user if successful.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
